openPath: https://ai.snowflake.com/domoinc/domopartner/#/ai → select "Revenue Command Center Agent" (Snowsight path: AI & ML → Agents → REVENUE_CC_AGENT)
statusNote: REVENUE_CC_AGENT is deployed on DOMOINC-DOMOPARTNER and callable via the Agent API (proven with cortex agents run — Score_Renewal_Risk + Search + Propose_Retention_Action fired end-to-end). USAGE granted to REVENUE_CC_READER, so it appears in CoWork for authorized users. Not yet confirmed launched to a business user in the CoWork UI.
scoping: Reads honor Horizon policies (same governed semantic view + RAP_REGION/MASK_ARR). Row-access policies filter by session role region; dynamic masking hides ARR for non-finance roles.
sso: Snowflake Intelligence inherits Snowsight SSO/MFA. External IdP federation (Okta, Azure AD) applies automatically. No additional auth configuration needed beyond the standard Snowflake login.

deepResearch.description: Deep Research decomposes complex questions into parallel sub-investigations across structured (Analyst) and unstructured (Search) sources, synthesizing a traced report in up to 10 minutes.
deepResearch.activation: In Snowflake Intelligence chat, click + → Deep Research, then submit the question.
deepResearch.question: Why did West Enterprise renewal risk rise and what should we do?

artifacts.title: West Enterprise Risk Driver Breakdown
artifacts.citation: SQL: SELECT top_risk_driver, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS affected_accounts FROM FACT_RENEWAL_RISK WHERE region='West' AND segment='Enterprise' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

artifacts.title: INC-0001 Post-Incident Review: West Region Platform Reliability Degradation
artifacts.citation: DOC-001: 6h47m platform reliability incident on 2026-05-28 affecting 77% of West Enterprise portfolio

artifacts.title: Renewal Save Playbook Recommendations
artifacts.citation: DOC-040, DOC-045: Executive Escalation Protocol + Multi-Year Commitment Incentive for accounts within 30 days of renewal

artifacts.title: Revenue at Risk Quantification
artifacts.citation: SQL: SELECT SUM(revenue_at_risk) AS total_at_risk, AVG(renewal_risk_score) AS avg_score FROM FACT_RENEWAL_RISK WHERE region='West' AND segment='Enterprise' → $63.4M at risk, avg score 83.2

artifacts.title: Live Renewal-Risk Score — ACC-00008
artifacts.citation: SCORE_RENEWAL_RISK('ACC-00008') → 99.9% High Risk, model v10.0, ARR $624,829 — top driver: 125 SLA breaches (90d). Native Model Registry inference, no data movement.

skills.name: Renewal Risk Briefing
skills.description: Generates a structured executive briefing on renewal risk for a given region/segment, combining quantitative metrics with root-cause citations and prioritized save plays.

skills.name: Account Deep Dive
skills.description: Produces a single-account dossier: ARR history, risk trajectory, support case timeline, and recommended next-best-action from the playbook corpus.

skills.name: Forecast Variance Explainer
skills.description: Explains why actual revenue deviated from forecast for a given period, citing contributing accounts and external factors from unstructured sources.

skills.name: Save-Play Proposer
skills.description: Grounds a retention play in the playbook corpus (Search) and stages it with Propose_Retention_Action as a governed Proposed/Pending action — recommendation only, routed into the REVENUE_CC_WRITER approval path, never auto-executed.
